FLIP is a smart and unique study timer app designed to improve your focus by using a simple habit—placing your phone face-down. When you put your phone face-down on a surface, the timer starts automatically. If you pick it up, the timer pauses. It’s that easy to stay on track.The app also tracks your study behavior and shows useful statistics. You can check how long you studied, how often you got distracted by your phone, and even compare your progress with friends or other users worldwide. This makes studying more engaging and motivating.FLIP also offers customizable focus music and relaxing background sounds to help you concentrate better.
